title: Pre-Lit Decorated Artificial Christmas Garland Green Branches With Pine Cones Holly Berries & Warm White LED Lights Indoor/Outdoor Xmas Decoration 6ft
features: Mixed green foilage decorated with berries, pinecones & holly leaves
Waterproof battery pack with timer function: 6 hours on / 18 hours off
description: Decorate your mantlepiece, bannisters and porch doorways with this festive light up garland.The garland has 180 tips and features artificial pine-like branches that have been covered in extra festive decorations including red berries, pinecones and holly leaves. The garland has been finished with 30 warm white static effect LED lights that are sure to add a festive glow to any area in your home.Each garland has a length of approximately 6ft (180cm) and an attached waterproof control box for the LED lights. The box includes 3 settings: Timer, On and Off. When the light is set to Timer it will stay on for 6 hours and off for 18 hours.The base of the garland is made from a thick wire that is mouldable allowing your to position it anyway that you like. Perfect for hugging your fireplace and creating a centrepiece that all of your family and guests can enjoy.
